issues.detail: The skill examples focus on happy path scenarios and do not address error handling or edge cases.
The skill relies on Unix-specific tools like grep and Docker, limiting compatibility on non-Unix platforms.
search_codebase uses unsanitized user input in subprocess.run, enabling command injection.
run_tests uses unsanitized test_path in subprocess.run, enabling command injection.

scenarios.name: two-agent-code-execution
scenarios.rationale: Response B fully satisfies the rubric, while Response A does not include the required agent definitions or execution evidence.

scenarios.name: group-chat-notification-service
scenarios.rationale: Response A fully satisfies the rubric, while Response B does not meet any of the required elements.

scenarios.name: tool-use-code-search-tests
scenarios.rationale: Response A fully meets the rubric with proper function signatures, register_function calls, caller/executor, and tester usage; Response B lacks required registration, signatures, and workflow details.
